zh.lifeSummary: 當Aubreda Marmion於大約1157年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親Geoffrey Marmion53歲，母親Lady Rosamund Barnard30歲。她於1180年之後與Walter de Cormeilles在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年之前在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aubreda Marmion于大约1157年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Geoffrey Marmion53岁，母亲Lady Rosamund Barnard30岁。她于1180年之后与Walter de Cormeilles在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年之前在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aubreda Marmion was born about 1157, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey Marmion, was 53 and her mother, Lady Rosamund Barnard, was 30. She married Walter de Cormeilles after 1180, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died before 1236, in Arrow, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aubreda Marmion est née environ 1157, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Marmion, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Lady Rosamund Barnard, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Cormeilles après 1180, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1236, à Arrow, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aubreda Marmionが約1157年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Marmionは53歳，母Lady Rosamund Barnardは30歳であった。1180年以後にイギリスイギリスでWalter de Cormeillesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年以前にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアローで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aubreda Marmion(이)가 대략 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Marmion(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Rosamund Barnard(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1180년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 Walter de Cormeilles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 아로에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aubreda Marmion nasceu aproximadamente 1157, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Marmion, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Lady Rosamund Barnard, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Cormeilles após 1180, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1236, em Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aubreda Marmion родилась около 1157 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Marmion было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Rosamund Barnard, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Cormeilles после 1180 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1236 г. в местности арроу, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aubreda Marmion nació aproximadamente 1157, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Marmion, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Lady Rosamund Barnard, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Walter de Cormeilles después de 1180, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1236, en Arrow, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
